text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Lack of color detected in Trainer's face. 
Exhaustion con… firmed…

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Beeep… Energy levels diminished. Unit will self-destruct in three, two, one…

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
…Apologies. That was a joke. 
A bit of robot humor.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
My data reserves suggest that humor can 
alleviate fatigue… Did that help at all?
